hooks.prompt:
A git commit was just made. Review the committed changes by running `git diff HEAD~1 HEAD` and `git log -1 --format='%s%n%n%b'`. Check for:
1. Conventional Commits format compliance (type(scope): description)
2. Atomic commit principle (one logical change per commit)
3. Code quality issues (typos, debug code, TODO/FIXME left behind, trailing whitespace)
4. Potential bugs or logic errors in the diff
5. Security concerns (hardcoded secrets, credentials)

Provide a brief review summary. If everything looks good, say so concisely. If there are issues, list them clearly with file and line references. Keep the review short and actionable.
